name: hakim
description: Evidence-bound coding governance for Codex: smallest safe diff, reuse-first, native-first, and explicit evidence boundaries.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-bound coding governance for smaller, safer changes.
interface.longDescription: Hakim guides Codex toward the smallest safe change: reuse existing code first, prefer standard-library and native platform capabilities before dependencies, challenge speculative architecture, and keep completion or performance claims tied to inspectable evidence.
defaultPrompt: Use Hakim full mode and make the smallest safe change.
Use Hakim to review this diff for removable complexity.
